# americancloud_region (Data Source)

Look up a region by its label.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "americancloud_region" "west" {
  label = "us-west-0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `label` (String) Region label, e.g. `us-west-0`.

### Read-Only

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable region name.
- `id` (String) Region identifier (UUID).
